name: com.opsmill/infrahub-mcp
description: An MCP server connecting AI assistants to Infrahub for infrastructure data management.

environmentVariables.name: INFRAHUB_ADDRESS
environmentVariables.description: URL of your Infrahub instance (e.g. https://infrahub.example.com)

environmentVariables.name: INFRAHUB_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Infrahub API token. Use this or INFRAHUB_USERNAME + INFRAHUB_PASSWORD.

environmentVariables.name: INFRAHUB_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: Infrahub username for basic-auth login. Requires INFRAHUB_PASSWORD.

environmentVariables.name: INFRAHUB_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Infrahub password for basic-auth login. Requires INFRAHUB_USERNAME.

environmentVariables.name: INFRAHUB_TIMEOUT
environmentVariables.description: HTTP request timeout in seconds (default: 30).

environmentVariables.name: INFRAHUB_MCP_READ_ONLY
environmentVariables.description: Disable write operations (default: false).

environmentVariables.name: INFRAHUB_MCP_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Logging verbosity: debug, info, warning, error (default: info).

environmentVariables.name: INFRAHUB_MCP_BRANCH_PATTERN
environmentVariables.description: Naming pattern for session branches. Supports {date}, {hex}, {user} placeholders (default: mcp/session-{date}-{hex}).

environmentVariables.name: INFRAHUB_MCP_MAX_BRANCH_RETRIES
environmentVariables.description: Max collision retries for branch name generation (default: 5, range: 1-20).

environmentVariables.name: INFRAHUB_MCP_RATE_LIMIT_RPS
environmentVariables.description: Max sustained requests per second; 0 disables (default: 0).

environmentVariables.name: INFRAHUB_MCP_RATE_LIMIT_BURST
environmentVariables.description: Token-bucket burst capacity; 0 = auto (default: 0).

environmentVariables.name: INFRAHUB_MCP_RETRY_MAX_ATTEMPTS
environmentVariables.description: Max retry attempts for transient failures; 0 disables (default: 0).

environmentVariables.name: INFRAHUB_MCP_RETRY_BASE_DELAY
environmentVariables.description: Initial delay between retries in seconds (default: 1.0).

environmentVariables.name: INFRAHUB_MCP_CACHE_ENABLED
environmentVariables.description: Enable response caching for schema/list operations (default: false).

environmentVariables.name: INFRAHUB_MCP_CACHE_LIST_TTL
environmentVariables.description: TTL in seconds for list operations (default: 300).

environmentVariables.name: INFRAHUB_MCP_CACHE_READ_TTL
environmentVariables.description: TTL in seconds for read-resource and cacheable tool calls (default: 3600).

environmentVariables.name: INFRAHUB_MCP_OTEL_ENABLED
environmentVariables.description: Enable OpenTelemetry tracing spans (default: false).

environmentVariables.name: INFRAHUB_MCP_PROMETHEUS_ENABLED
environmentVariables.description: Expose Prometheus-format metrics at /metrics (default: false).

environmentVariables.name: INFRAHUB_MCP_DEREFERENCE_SCHEMAS
environmentVariables.description: Inline $ref in JSON schemas for client compatibility (default: false).

environmentVariables.name: INFRAHUB_MCP_PING_INTERVAL_MS
environmentVariables.description: Ping interval in ms for HTTP sessions; 0 disables (default: 0, max: 300000).

environmentVariables.name: INFRAHUB_MCP_AUTH_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Authentication mode: none, oidc, token-passthrough, or basic-passthrough (default: none).

environmentVariables.name: INFRAHUB_MCP_AUTH_SCOPES_WRITE
environmentVariables.description: OAuth scopes required for write operations, comma-separated (default: write).

environmentVariables.name: INFRAHUB_MCP_TOKEN_PASSTHROUGH_HEADER
environmentVariables.description: HTTP header carrying per-request credentials in passthrough modes (default: Authorization).
